107uq6o.text: Up next: Cheek Puff. Take a breath, puff air into both cheeks, hold, then move air slowly from one cheek to the other.

1edbmkh.text: Up next: Cheek Suck. Suck your cheeks inward against your teeth, like making a 'fish face'. Hold, then release.

1cqzyr.text: Up next: Closed Smile. Smile with lips closed, lifting both corners of your mouth gently. Hold, then relax.

1bah7wn.text: Up next: Emoji Big Smile 😄. Make a bright open smile, showing teeth only as much as feels comfortable. Hold, then release slowly.

y4bxc4.text: Up next: Emoji Kiss 😘. Pucker your lips forward like sending a kiss. Hold the center line steady, then relax.

coby5.text: Up next: Emoji Nose Scrunch 😖. Scrunch your nose lightly as if reacting to a strong smell. Hold the expression, then relax fully.

1imilo1.text: Up next: Emoji Sad Frown ☹️. Make a gentle sad face by lowering the mouth corners and lightly drawing the brows together. Hold, then release.

1nnybsw.text: Up next: Emoji Smile 🙂. Make a gentle happy face with lips closed. Hold the smile softly, then relax back to neutral.

1vyr1fp.text: Up next: Emoji Surprise 😮. Raise your eyebrows and make a soft O shape with your mouth, like a surprised face. Hold gently, then relax.

ci80l0.text: Up next: Emoji Wink 😉. Make a playful wink expression. Close one eye gently while the mouth stays lightly lifted, then relax.

63n431.text: Up next: Eyebrow Raise. Raise both eyebrows as if surprised. Hold gently for 5 seconds, then relax slowly.

qonli0.text: Up next: Eyebrow raise. Raise both eyebrows as if surprised, hold gently, then relax.

oxgmq4.text: Up next: Gentle Frown. Pull your eyebrows down and inward, as if concentrating. Hold, then relax.

166wc46.text: Up next: Independent Wink. Try to close one eye while keeping the other open. Switch sides each rep.

varop9.text: Up next: Lip Press. Press your lips firmly but gently together. Hold, then release.

55cx3w.text: Up next: Lip Pucker. Purse your lips forward as if blowing a kiss. Hold for 5 seconds, then relax.

1a6ijqz.text: Up next: Nostril Flare. Flare your nostrils outward, as if taking a deep breath through your nose. Hold gently, then relax.

kq8206.text: Up next: Open Smile. Smile widely, showing your teeth. Hold for 5 seconds, then relax slowly.

10cm7o6.text: Up next: Soft Eye Closure. Slowly close your eyes — don't squeeze. Hold softly for 5 seconds, then open slowly.

uspv67.text: Up next: Vowel A Shape. Say or silently mouth a slow, open A shape. Hold the jaw open gently, then relax fully.

wo8jo7.text: Up next: Vowel E Shape. Say or silently mouth a slow E shape. Stretch the lips sideways gently, hold, then relax.

aekvzd.text: Up next: Vowel I Shape. Say or silently mouth a slow I shape. Lift the corners lightly and keep the lips controlled.

fd15vw.text: Up next: Vowel O Shape. Say or silently mouth a rounded O shape. Hold the lips in a soft circle, then relax.

1w3rae8.text: Up next: Vowel U Shape. Say or silently mouth a rounded U shape. Bring the lips forward gently, hold, then relax.

5ar1jt.text: Vowel A Shape. Resting pose. Stay relaxed.

104fnf9.text: Vowel E Shape. Resting pose. Stay relaxed.

m31jvf.text: Vowel O Shape. Resting pose. Stay relaxed.

13991l1.text: Vowel U Shape. Resting pose. Stay relaxed.
